draft.content: Privileged operations must be denied unless the account has the administrator role.
Pricing responses are retained locally for five minutes to avoid repeated upstream work.
Pricing responses are kept in a local store for five minutes so repeated upstream calls are avoided.
Transient gateway failures are retried at most three times with an exponentially increasing delay.
Compliance audit records must contain a shortened actor identifier and the authorization outcome only.

code.query: check whether a person may perform a privileged operation
temporarily retain expensive computed values until they become stale
recover from temporary upstream errors with increasing pauses

memory.query: who is permitted to run a privileged operation
how long do we avoid another pricing request
what is the recovery policy for temporary gateway errors

context.query: explain how pricing avoids repeated work and survives temporary failures
describe privileged access and how its decision is recorded safely
